title: Screened Coulomb interaction
summary: The screened interaction W replaces the bare Coulomb kernel with an environment-dressed effective interaction in GW reasoning.
assumptions: Electronic screening can be summarized into an effective interaction that is softer than the bare Coulomb kernel.

regime.domain: screened interaction methods for charged excitations
boundary_conditions: screening is describable by a dielectric response

applies_to: GW self-energy construction and QSGW route interpretation

promotion.rationale: Manual L2 seed for reusable GW/QSGW excitation memory.

payload.definition: Dynamically screened interaction W = epsilon^-1 v used in GW self-energies.
payload.operational_role: Carries the screening physics that softens the bare interaction in practical GW calculations.
